---
name: Simplify
description: Reduces overall complexity of the package and demo
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Make a plan to reduce the complexity of the package and demo to be as simple as possible while maintaining the minimum required complexity to implement the existing functionality.  This is an optimization pass, do not preserve any backwards-compatible considerations at all: this is a form of API hardening and should always be completely clean to be the current standard.  Update the readme for any API or logic changes resulting from this plan.
